subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The letter which thou didst send several years ago hath but now arrived. From its contents it was understood that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه که چند سال پیش فرستاده بودی امسال رسید از مضمون مفهوم شد که
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
